title: Audio Generation & Transcription

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Application developer who triggers TTS or STT operations via static facades

actors.name: ElevenLabs API
actors.description: Third-party HTTP API for TTS (text-to-speech) and STT (speech-to-text)

actors.name: Queue System
actors.description: Laravel job queue for async audio/transcription generation

use_cases.name: Generate Audio from Text (TTS)
flow: Developer calls Audio::of(text) → returns PendingAudioGeneration
Developer optionally configures: voice(string), male(), female(), instructions(string), timeout(int)
Developer calls PendingAudioGeneration::generate(provider?, model?) → resolves provider from config
PendingAudioGeneration iterates providers, calls provider->audio(text, voice, instructions, model, timeout)
ElevenLabsProvider::audio() delegates to ElevenLabsGateway::generateAudio()
ElevenLabsGateway sends POST to https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{voice_id}
Returns AudioResponse(base64_audio, Meta(provider, model), 'audio/mpeg')

use_cases.name: Queue Audio Generation
flow: Developer calls Audio::of(text)->queue(provider?, model?)
If faked: Ai::recordAudioGeneration(QueuedAudioPrompt) → returns QueuedAudioResponse(FakePendingDispatch)
If real: dispatches GenerateAudio job → returns QueuedAudioResponse(PendingDispatch)

use_cases.name: Transcribe Audio File (STT)
audio_input_types: Base64Audio — from raw base64 string or UploadedFile
flow: Developer calls Transcription::of/fromBase64/fromPath/fromStorage/fromUpload → returns PendingTranscriptionGeneration
Developer optionally configures: language(ISO-639-1), diarize(bool), timeout(int)
Developer calls PendingTranscriptionGeneration::generate(provider?, model?) → resolves provider from config
PendingTranscriptionGeneration iterates providers, calls provider->transcribe(audio, language, diarize, model, timeout)
ElevenLabsProvider::transcribe() delegates to ElevenLabsGateway::generateTranscription()
ElevenLabsGateway sends multipart POST to https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/speech-to-text
If diarize=true, maps response['words'] to TranscriptionSegment objects (text, speaker_id, start, end)
Returns TranscriptionResponse(text, segments, Usage, Meta(provider, model))

use_cases.name: Queue Transcription Generation
use_cases.constraint: Only LocalAudio or StoredAudio allowed; throws LogicException for Base64Audio/UploadedFile
flow: Developer calls PendingTranscriptionGeneration::queue(provider?, model?)
Validates audio type is LocalAudio or StoredAudio
If faked: Ai::recordTranscriptionGeneration(QueuedTranscriptionPrompt) → returns QueuedTranscriptionResponse(FakePendingDispatch)
If real: dispatches GenerateTranscription job → returns QueuedTranscriptionResponse(PendingDispatch)

use_cases.name: Fake Audio Generation (Testing)
flow: Developer calls Audio::fake(responses) → delegates to Ai::fakeAudio(responses)
Subsequent Audio::of()->generate() calls use FakeAudioGateway instead of real provider

use_cases.name: Fake Transcription Generation (Testing)
flow: Developer calls Transcription::fake(responses) → delegates to Ai::fakeTranscriptions(responses)
Subsequent Transcription::of()->generate() calls use FakeTranscriptionGateway

key_relationships: Audio facade delegates_to Ai (for fake/assert operations)
Transcription facade delegates_to Ai (for fake/assert operations)
PendingAudioGeneration calls AudioProvider::audio() → ElevenLabsProvider (or configured provider)
ElevenLabsProvider uses ElevenLabsGateway (implements AudioGateway AND TranscriptionGateway)
failover_behavior: Both generate() methods catch FailoverableException, fire ProviderFailedOver event, and try next provider in list
important_notes: ElevenLabsGateway is the only gateway implementing both AudioGateway and TranscriptionGateway
Other transcription providers include OpenAI (whisper) and Mistral
Queued transcription requires LocalAudio or StoredAudio (not Base64/UploadedFile — serialization constraint)
Default TTS model: eleven_multilingual_v2; default STT model: scribe_v2
PendingAudioGeneration uses Conditionable trait (Laravel when/unless support)
Diarization returns TranscriptionSegment per word with speaker_id, start, end timestamps
